assertion_results.text: The response asks at least 3 specific clarifying questions about: which fields to search, what relevance ranking means, and what performance threshold is required
assertion_results.evidence: The response asks 5 clarifying questions. Question 1 (line 59): 'Search scope — which fields should be searchable?' asks about fields like name, version, namespace/purl, and license. Question 2 (line 65): 'What does "relevant" mean for search result ranking?' asks about ranking strategy (exact match > prefix match > substring match > fuzzy match). Question 3 (line 72): 'What is the performance threshold, and what query parameters / response shape should the endpoint use?' asks about maximum acceptable response time (e.g., p95 < 200ms, p99 < 500ms) and dataset size.
